item.title: ProSnookerBlog: Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 6s Good luck to our final four at the Landywood English Amateur Championship - snooker’s oldest r
item.description: Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 6s Good luck to our final four at the Landywood English Amateur Championship - snooker’s oldest recognised competition Cita English Partnership for Snooker and Billiards @EPSBofficial · 44min SEMI-FINALS The last four are in action at the Landywood Snooker Club this morning as they aim to lift the prestigious English Amateur Championship title Vladislav Gradinari Sean Maddocks Jeff Cundy Ashley Carty Follow via WPBSA SnookerScores… http:// dlvr.it/TS6NvV

item.title: livedarts: Live Darts reposteó Live Darts @livedarts · 14h MVG: "He didn't make a joke. He's one of those guys who tries to be funn
item.description:
Live Darts reposteó Live Darts @livedarts · 14h MVG: "He didn't make a joke. He's one of those guys who tries to be funny. He never beat me in his life and he will never beat me in his life - he's not good enough.
"Even my B or C game beats him, but who cares?
"The day I'm going to worry about Unterbuchner, that's the day Mostrar más 29 20 810 194 mil
